title: Vanilla But I Like It This Way
description: minecraft but in my vision and mine alone
body:
# Vanilla But I Like It This Way

A lightweight vanilla+ modpack focused on **things that *should* already be in the game**, along with select **performance, quality-of-life, and aesthetic improvements**. No overhauls. No tech trees. Just Minecraft, but smoother, smarter, and more like you'd design it yourself.

> *my wayyyyy – Frank Sinatra, some year*

## 🔧 What's included?

* **Performance Enhancers**:
  Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, C2ME, Spark — all tuned to squeeze every frame and tick from your setup.

* **Visual Tweaks (No Shaders Required)**:
  Enhanced Block Entities, Dynamic Lights, Falling Leaves, Continuity, OptiGUI, SkinLayers3D, glowing torchflowers. Clean visuals, immersive world.

* **UI & Feedback Improvements**:
  BetterF3, BetterStats, Armor Trim Fix, Status Effect Bars, Chat Heads, Durability Tooltips, Debugify — everything you didn’t know you needed.

* **Smart QoL**:
  Mouse Tweaks, Clumps, Controlling, Right Click Harvest, Easy Shulker Boxes, Freecam, MiniHUD, Litematica, Entity Culling, Make Bubbles Pop.

* **Gameplay Fixes & Microfeatures**:
  Carpet TIS additions, Elytra Physics, Armor Stand Arms, Toggleable Item Frames, Scribble, Bookshelf Inspector, PickUp Notifier, Rain-Aware Crops.

* **Optional fun & polish**:
  Zoomify, More Chiseled Bookshelves, Panorama, Better Beds, Sound Physics, Skin Shuffle, World Playtime.

## 🧱 Who’s this for?

People who love vanilla Minecraft, but are *tired of waiting for Mojang to add the obvious stuff*. You won’t find magic systems, 300 types of ore, or overdesigned GUIs here. Just sensible additions, subtle improvements, and more control.
